summary: Fixed two boss-reported issues: (1) Mobile UX - sidebar now hidden by default on mobile (<768px), slides in as overlay when toggled via hamburger menu in header, has X close button and 'View Map' sticky button, backdrop overlay dismisses it; (2) Attraction filter - confirmed API returns 1253 attractions correctly, root cause was mobile layout covering the map entirely so users couldn't see results. All 37 client tests pass, build clean.
next_action: Monitor for further boss feedback. All P0/P1 features complete.
